General.Name: Wing On Co International Ltd
General.Description: Wing On Company International Limited operates department stores in the People's Republic of China, Australia, and the United States. The company operates through Department Stores and Property Investment segments. Its department stores offer electrical appliances, kitchen and dining, bedding and bath, home sundries, grocery, personal care, travel and accessories, children and babies, toys, men's wear, women's' wear, active, shoes and handbags, umbrellas, and cosmetics products. The company also leases commercial premises in Hong Kong, Australia, and the United States. In addition, it offers securities trading, property management, and computer services. Further, the company owns trademarks; and acts as a trustee for investment trusts. It also sells its products online. The company was founded in 1907 and is based in Central, Hong Kong. Wing On Company International Limited operates as a subsidiary of Wing On International Holdings Limited.
General.Address: Wing On Centre, Central, Hong Kong
